label: Software Engineering
description: I build the backend systems and APIs that power your software. I focus on database management, security, and making sure everything runs without errors.

label: Web Development
description: I build responsive and fast websites using React and Next.js. I make sure the site looks good on all devices and is easy for users to navigate.

label: Website Management
description: I handle the maintenance of your website after it's live. This includes updates, security monitoring, and making sure your site stays online.
